chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2396 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى اَلْخَثْعَمِيُّ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ تَخْرُجْ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ فِي حَاجَةٍ فَإِذَا كَانَ يَوْمُ اَلسَّبْتِ وَ طَلَعَتِ اَلشَّمْسُ فَاخْرُجْ فِي حَاجَتِكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2396 - Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Khath'ami narrated from him, peace be upon him:
"Do not go out on Friday for any need, but if it is Saturday and the sun has risen, then go out for your need."
